overall.description: A third-person perspective walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player character follows pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas along wet sidewalks, passing futuristic skyscrapers, debris, and parked vehicles before approaching a busy intersection with futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon-lit pedestrian traffic

agents.ego_description: walking steadily behind a group of pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas along the wet sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person in yellow coat carrying purple glowing umbrella walking ahead of the player
person in dark suit carrying yellow glowing umbrella walking alongside

entered.detail: tall dark buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents towering above the street
smooth gray concrete wall running along the right side of the sidewalk
various glowing signs and advertisements in yellow, purple, and blue hues
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera following a group of pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas. Tall futuristic skyscrapers loom overhead while neon signs reflect off the wet pavement. The player character walks steadily behind a person in a yellow coat with a purple umbrella, passing a concrete retaining wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk edge with accumulated trash and debris against the wall

events.description: camera tilts down to focus on trash and debris accumulated along the base of the concrete wall
camera tilts back up to resume forward walking perspective

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward while briefly looking down at the ground debris

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow coat with umbrella continuing forward ahead of the player

entered.detail: scattered litter and debris including bottles and trash accumulated along the wall base

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts downward to reveal trash and debris littering the edge of the sidewalk against the concrete wall. After a few seconds, the view returns to the forward walking position, showing the wet reflective pavement and the continuing path ahead. The pedestrian group remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk passing a large parked industrial truck and corporate building entrance

events.description: approaching and passing a large dark purple industrial truck parked on the right side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past a large parked truck and approaching a building entrance with stairs

notable_agents.action: large dark purple armored truck parked against the wall with hazard markings

entered.detail: dark building facade with illuminated 'DELAMAIN' logo and large motorcycle advertisement
wide concrete stairs leading up to the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the sidewalk, passing the accumulated trash and approaching a large dark purple truck parked on the right. The camera moves alongside the truck, revealing a building entrance with concrete stairs and a prominent 'DELAMAIN' corporate logo with a large digital billboard showing a motorcycle advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with futuristic vehicle traffic and crosswalk

events.description: approaching street crossing with moving futuristic vehicles including a yellow compact car and red sports car

agents.ego_description: moving toward the street intersection to cross, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic compact car driving through the intersection
red sports car moving through traffic near the crosswalk

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with colorful illuminated strips on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow sidewalk into a wider intersection area. The large truck and concrete wall are left behind as the scene opens to reveal a busy street with futuristic vehicles, including a distinctive yellow compact car and a red sports car. The camera approaches a colorful illuminated crosswalk with tall skyscrapers now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk street that gradually opens from a narrow sidewalk into a bustling city intersection. It begins by trailing a group of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, moving past towering skyscrapers and a concrete retaining wall while neon lights shimmer on the wet pavement. As the camera briefly tilts down to reveal debris littering the sidewalk's edge, it returns to a forward gaze to follow the path toward a large, dark purple truck. The scene then shifts past the vehicle to reveal a building entrance marked by a Delamain corporate logo and a digital motorcycle advertisement. Finally, the camera emerges from the confined walkway into a wide intersection, leaving the wall behind to reveal futuristic yellow and red cars navigating a colorful, illuminated crosswalk beneath a skyline of skyscrapers.
